ComponentType: Low Capacitance TVS Diode Array / ESD Protection Device
Description: This component is a bidirectional, low-capacitance TVS diode array designed to protect two high-speed data lines (e.g., USB D+/D-, Ethernet) from electrostatic discharge (ESD), electrical fast transients (EFT), and surge events. It clamps transient overvoltage to a safe level with minimal impact on signal integrity due to its ultra-low junction capacitance and leakage current, making it suitable for high-speed interfaces operating at 5V.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Protected line 1. Connect to the signal line to be protected.
Common ground reference for the protection circuitry.
Protected line 2. Connect to the signal line to be protected.
This pin is not internally connected.
Common ground reference for the protection circuitry.
Supply voltage pin. Connect to the positive supply rail (e.g., 5V).
